objective: Stand up Cortex policy composition and the OpenClaw integration seam while keeping Layer 2 OpenClaw-native.

workstreams.name: Bounded startup stance
outputs: knowledge pointers instead of full corpora

exit_criteria: Policy can be resolved and injected without replacing OpenClaw sessions.
The startup bundle order is explicit and bounded.
Epic 02 can consume the established OpenClaw boundary without redesigning Layer 2.
risks: Overreaching into OpenClaw session mechanics too early.
Treating policy as prompt text instead of a resolvable contract.
